title: Ukuxhathisa koLuntu, i-1970s-1980s: Ukusuka kwiNkqubo yeNgqondo yaBantsundu (Black Consciousness) ukuya kwi-UDF
subject: History

sources.title: Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)

slides.title: Ukuxhathisa koLuntu, i-1970s-1980s
slides.lead: Indlela ukuxhathisa kwangaphakathi okwabuyisela ngayo amandla abachasi bocalucalulo (apartheid) - ukusuka kwiNkqubo yeNgqondo yaBantsundu (Black Consciousness) neSoweto ukuya kwi-UDF nakwiimeko zongxunguphalo (states of emergency).

media.alt: Inqindi eliqinileyo eliphakanyisiweyo linyuka ngaphezu komgca othe tyaba oqinileyo, ubonisa ukuxhathisa kwabantu abaninzi kucalucalulo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='20' height='72' rx='5' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='140' y='44' width='40' height='26' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='138' y='40' width='9' height='20' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='150' y='36' width='9' height='24' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='162' y='38' width='9' height='22' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='40' y='150' width='240' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza isakhelo lale yunithi. Ngeminyaka yee-1960s ukuvalwa kwe-ANC ne-PAC, uMbono waseRivonia (Rivonia Trial) kunye nezigwebo ezinde zentolongo kwashiya ukuxhathisa kwangaphakathi kubuthathaka. Esi sifundo silandela indlela, ukususela ekupheleni kweminyaka yee-1960s ukuya phambili, apho ilizwe latsho lakha kwakhona uxhathiso olutsha ngaphakathi elizweni: kuqala izimvo (i-Black Consciousness), emva koko uvukelo lolutsha (1976), abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo (iimanyano zabasebenzi), kwaye ekugqibeleni umbutho wabantu abaninzi (i-UDF) apho urhulumente wazama ukuwutshabalalisa ngolawulo longxunguphalo. Cela abafundi baqhubeke bebuza: ngubani oxhathisayo, njani, kwaye urhulumente uphendula njani?

slides.title: 'Ishumi leminyaka elithe cwaka' nokuphela kwalo
slides.lead: Ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yee-1960s ucalucalulo lwalubonakala luqinisekile - kodwa ukuxhathisa kwakuhlanganisana kwakhona ngokuthe cwaka.

blocks.text: Emva kweSharpeville (1960) urhulumente wavala i-**ANC** ne-**PAC**, wavalela iinkokeli ezinjengoNelson Mandela entolongweni, waza waqhubela iintshukumo zenkululeko ekubhacweni nasemzileni. Uqhankqalazo oluvulelekileyo lwabantu abaninzi ngaphakathi elizweni lwatyunyuzwa, kwaye iminyaka yee-1960s ngamanye amaxesha ibizwa ngokuba 'lishumi leminyaka elithe cwaka'.

items: Imithetho ecinezelayo yavumela ukuvalelwa ngaphandle kwetyala nokuvalwa kwamatshantliziyo.
Uqoqosho lwakhula, kodwa abantu abaNtsundu bahlala bengabandakanywanga kumandla ezopolitiko.
Uxhathiso olutsha lwaluza kukhula kubafundi, kubasebenzi nakuluntu endaweni yamaqela avaliweyo.

slides.notes: Misela ukuqhubeka notshintsho. Abafundi sele bedibene neSharpeville nokujika baye kumzabalazo oxhobileyo kwiyunithi yangaphambili. Gxininisa ukuba uvuselelo lweminyaka yee-1970s lwaluyibali lemibutho emitsha eyayisebenza ngokusemthethweni okanye ngokusemthethweni ngokuphakathi ngaphakathi eMzantsi Afrika, kuba iintshukumo ezisekiweyo zazivaliwe. Oku kubeka isiseko sokuba kutheni i-Black Consciousness kunye neemanyano zabasebenzi ezizimeleyo zazibaluleke kangaka.

slides.title: I-Black Consciousness noSteve Biko
slides.lead: 'Isixhobo esinamandla ngaphezulu esandleni somcinezeli yingqondo yalowo ucinezelweyo.'

blocks.text: Bekhathazekile yipolitiki yabafundi ekhokelwa ngabamhlophe, abafundi abaNtsundu bahlukana ukwenza i-**South African Students' Organisation (SASO)** ngo-1969, uSteve **Biko** engumongameli wayo wokuqala. Intanda-bulumko yabo, i-**Black Consciousness (BC)**, yakhuthaza abantu baseMzantsi Afrika abaNtsundu ukuba bakhabe ingqondo yokuzithoba, bazingce ngesazisi sabo, baze bazikhulule ngokwasengqondweni ngaphambi kokuba bazikhulule ngokwezopolitiko.

items: Igama elithi 'Ntsundu' lachazwa ngokwezopolitiko liquka abantu abaNtsundu, abeBala nabaseIndiya abacinezelwa lucalucalulo.
IBlack People's Convention (1972) yasasaza izimvo ze-BC eluntwini ngeeprojekthi zokuzinceda.
I-BC yanika isizukulwana esitsha ukuzithemba nolwimi lokuxhathisa.

media.alt: Intloko emiselwe ngecala inelanga eliphakamayo ngaphakathi, ebonisa inkululeko yengqondo nokuzingca.

slides.notes: I-SASO yasekwa ngo-1968 yaza yasungulwa ngokusesikweni ngo-1969 eTurfloop; gcina ugxininiso ku-1969 njengonyaka wokusungulwa. Chaza i-BC njengenkululeko yengqondo: ukuzingca, ukuzimela nomanyano phakathi kwabacinezelweyo. Qaphela ukuchazwa ngokwezopolitiko kwegama elithi 'Ntsundu' ukwakha isazisi esibanzi. Zoba umahluko neentshukumo zangaphambili: i-BC yayisebenza ngokuvulelekileyo nangokusemthethweni ekuqaleni, oko yenye yezizathu zokuba yasasazeke ngokukhawuleza kwiikhampasi, kwiikliniki nakwiinkqubo zoluntu.

slides.title: Uvukelo lwaseSoweto
slides.lead: Uqhankqalazo lwabafundi olwalulwa isiBhulu ezikolweni lwaba luvukelo lwelizwe lonke.

blocks.text: Ngo-1974 urhulumente wayalela ukuba i-**siBhulu (Afrikaans)** lisetyenziswe ngokulinganayo nesiNgesi njengolwimi lokufundisa ezikolweni zabantu abaNtsundu. Abafundi, abaninzi babo bephenjelelwa yi-Black Consciousness, babona oku 'njengolwimi lomcinezeli'. Nge-**16 kaJuni 1976** amawaka abafundi baseSoweto baqhankqalaza ngoxolo; amapolisa athi gqi ngokudubula, waza uqhankqalazo lwadubula lwaba luvukelo olwasasazeka kulo lonke ilizwe.

items: Amanani asemthethweni abeka ababhubhileyo ku-23 ngosuku lokuqala; uqikelelo lwamva luphakame kakhulu.
Umfanekiso kaHector Pieterson osweleka wenza iimbalasane zeendaba zehlabathi.
Amawaka olutsha abalekela ekubhacweni aza azibandakanya neentshukumo zenkululeko.

media.alt: Umgca wabafundi abahambayo bephethe iphephakhankanyiso eliphakanyisiweyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='24' width='54' height='30' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='176' y='54' width='4' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='72' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='84' cy='54' r='12'/><rect x='77' y='68' width='14' height='46'/><circle cx='128' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='121' y='72' width='14' height='42'/></g><rect x='24' y='126' width='196' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha ubundlobongela ngoxanduva: gxininisa injongo yoxolo yabafundi kunye namandla angalinganiyo asetyenzisiweyo. Inani labafileyo liyaphikiswa - caphula i-23 esemthethweni yosuku lokuqala ngoxa uqaphela uqikelelo oluphezulu lwababhali-mbali, ungasebenzisi inani elinye 'lokugqibela'. Gxininisa iziphumo: ukugxekwa kwehlabathi, ukwanda kwabantu abazibandakanya ne-ANC ne-PAC ekubhacweni, nokufika kolutsha njengamandla aphambili emzabalazweni. Nxulumanisa noMfundo weBantu (Bantu Education) kwiyunithi yeBanga 9.

slides.title: Ukusweleka kukaBiko nokuvalwa kweminyaka yowe-1977
slides.lead: Urhulumente wazama ukubulala umbono ngokuthulisa imibutho yawo.

blocks.text: **USteve Biko** wavalelwa waza wasweleka esaphethwe ngamapolisa nge-**12 kaSeptemba 1977** ngenxa yamanxeba awawafumana ngethuba lophando-mbuzo. Ukusweleka kwakhe kwabangela isikhalo sehlabathi. Nge-**19 ka-Okthobha 1977** urhulumente wavala malunga **nemibutho eyi-18 yeBlack Consciousness nenxulumene nayo**, kuquka i-SASO neBlack People's Convention, waza wavala amaphephandaba awayenika iingxelo ngale ntshukumo.

items: UBiko waba luphawu lwehlabathi loxhathiso nolokhohlakala kocalucalulo.
Ukuvala imibutho akuzange kuyitshabalalise izimvo eyayizisasazile.
Amatshantliziyo amaninzi ahlanganisana kwakhona ngeemanyano, iicawa nemibutho yoluntu.

media.alt: Ikhandlela elivutha ngokuzinzileyo ecaleni kwekhonkco elophukileyo lwetyathanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='72' y='70' width='20' height='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M82 46 q10 12 0 22 q-10 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 74 a14 14 0 1 1 0 28 a14 14 0 0 1 0 -28 Z' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M138 88 a14 14 0 1 0 12 0' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Uphando ngokusweleka kukaBiko lwafumanisa ukuba akukho mntu unoxanduva, into ngokwayo eyaba bubungqina bentswela-bulungisa yocalucalulo; ungayikhankanya oku ngoxa ugcina iinkcukacha zilingana neminyaka. Ingongoma ephambili yohlalutyo: ucinezelo lwalunokuvala imibutho, lwaze lubulale iinkokeli, kodwa i-Black Consciousness yayisele iyitshintshile indlela isizukulwana esicinga ngayo, kwaye abo bantu bathwala umzabalazo bawusa kwizakhelo ezitsha. Oku kudibanisa kakuhle nokunyuka kweemanyano zabasebenzi.

slides.title: Amandla abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo
slides.lead: Uqhankqalazo neemanyano zaguqula amandla oqoqosho aba luxinzelelo lwezopolitiko.

blocks.text: Uqhankqalazo **lwaseThekwini lwango-1973** - amashumi amawaka abasebenzi ayeka ukusebenza - lwabonisa amandla entshukumo yentsebenziswano lwaza lwadala iliza elitsha leemanyano zabasebenzi abaNtsundu ezizimeleyo. Zakhula ubudede beshumi leminyaka, zasungula i-**Federation of South African Trade Unions (FOSATU)** ngo-1979, kwaye ngoDisemba 1985, i-**Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)** enkulu ngakumbi.

items: I-COSATU yasungulwa nge-1 kaDisemba 1985 noElijah Barayi engumongameli noJay Naidoo engunobhala-jikelele.
Iimanyano zanxulumanisa izicelo zomvuzo nomzabalazo obanzi ochasene nocalucalulo.
Uqhankqalazo kunye nokungayi emsebenzini (stayaways) kwaba zizixhobo ezinamandla ngeminyaka yee-1980s.

media.alt: Isakhiwo sefektri kunye neqela labasebenzi bemi kunye phambi kwaso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='50' width='74' height='70' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='166' y='30' width='14' height='24' fill='#5c6b40'/><rect x='160' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='186' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='72' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='65' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='104' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='97' y='84' width='14' height='36'/></g><rect x='20' y='120' width='204' height='8' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuba kutheni iimanyano zazibalulekile: ucalucalulo lwaluxhomekeke kubasebenzi abaNtsundu, ngoko abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo babenokonzakalisa uqoqosho baze banyanzelise ukuxoxa. I-FOSATU (1979) yakha isithethe esingacalucaluli, esisekelwe kumsebenzi wefektri; i-COSATU (1985) yamanyanisa amalungu amaninzi ngakumbi yaza yanxulumana ngokuvulelekileyo nomzabalazo obanzi wenkululeko. Nxulumanisa nexesha le-UDF: iimanyano nemibutho yoluntu zazisebenzisana ngokuqhubekayo ngokungayi emsebenzini nangokuqhankqalaza (boycotts).

slides.title: IPalamente eNamagumbi Amathathu (Tricameral Parliament)
slides.lead: 'Uhlaziyo' olunika abanye ilungelo lokuvota ngoxa lukhupha uninzi.

blocks.text: Ngo-1983 urhulumente wazisa umgaqo-siseko omtsha owadala i-**Tricameral Parliament** enamagumbi ahlukeneyo amathathu: elinye lelabamhlophe, elinye lelabeBala kwaye elinye lelabaseIndiya - kodwa **kwakungekho kumelwa nakancinci kuninzi lwabantu abaNtsundu**. Yayilungiselelwe ukwahlula abacinezelweyo nokunika ucalucalulo ubuso obamkelekayo ngakumbi.

items: Amandla okwenene ahlala esezandleni zabamhlophe ngenkqubo enobunzima.
Abantu abaNtsundu babemele ukusebenzisa 'amalungelo' kuphela kumaBantustan.
Endaweni yokwahlula abachasi, yabamanyanisa kuqhankqalazo.

media.alt: Iibhokisi ezintathu ezahlukeneyo zamagumbi, ezimbini zincinci enye inkulu inamandla, uninzi lushiyeke ngaphandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='56' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='86' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='142' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='206' cy='84' r='9'/><circle cx='222' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='210' cy='104' r='9'/></g><rect x='198' y='116' width='40' height='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='16' y='108' width='176' height='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Esi sesinye sezizathu eziphambili zokusekwa kwe-UDF. Yenza ingongoma yohlalutyo icace: inkqubo ye-Tricameral yayisicwangciso sokuthengwa nokwahlula - thenga izikhulu zabeBala nabaseIndiya, ubeke abantu abaNtsundu bebodwa kumaBantustan. Buza abafundi ukuba kutheni ukukhupha uninzi kwenza 'uhlaziyo' luyimpazamo yezopolitiko. Kwanika uxhathiso isikhalazo esinye, esimanyanisayo.

slides.title: IUnited Democratic Front

blocks.text: Nge-**20 ka-Agasti 1983** malunga nabantu abayi-10,000 bahlanganisana e-**Mitchells Plain**, eKapa, ukusungula i-**United Democratic Front (UDF)**. Bephendula isimemo esivela kuMfundisi u-**Allan Boesak** sokuchasa umgaqo-siseko we-Tricameral, abathunywa abavela kwimibutho engamalungu amalunga ne-**565** - imibutho yoluntu (civics), iimanyano, iicawa, imibutho yabafundi neyabasetyhini - bazibandakanya kumanyano olunye, olubanzi.

items: I-UDF yazichaza ngokuvulelekileyo neenjongo zoMqulu weNkululeko (Freedom Charter) ne-ANC eyayisekubhacweni.
Iinkokeli zaziquka uAlbertina Sisulu, uArchie Gumede noPopo Molefe.
Yaququzelela uqhankqalazo, ukungayi emsebenzini nemikhankaso yabantu abaninzi kulo lonke ilizwe.

media.alt: Abantu abaninzi abancinci behlanganisene phantsi kwebhena elinye, bebonisa umbutho omanyeneyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='22' width='100' height='30' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='118' y='52' width='4' height='30' fill='#5c1414'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='66' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='120' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='148' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='174' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='200' cy='96' r='9'/></g><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='53' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='79' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='107' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='135' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='163' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='189' cy='118' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='132' width='196' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: I-UDF sisiqu soxhathiso lwangaphakathi lweminyaka yee-1980s. Gxininisa ubume bayo - umbutho wamakhulu amalungu azimeleyo endaweni yeqela elinye - into eyayenza kube nzima urhulumente ukuyivala. Yayingacalucaluli kwaye yayisekelwe kuMqulu weNkululeko (Freedom Charter), isebenza njengomhlobo wangaphakathi we-ANC eyayisekubhacweni. Qaphela amagama eenkokeli ukwandisa umfanekiso ngaphaya kwabantu abanye okanye ababini, kuquka iinkokeli zabasetyhini ezinjengoAlbertina Sisulu.

slides.title: Ukuxhathisa koluntu, i-1969-1986

events.label: UBiko usweleka esaphethwe; imibutho ye-BC iyavalwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa oku ukudibanisa ngaphambi kweeslayidi zokugqibela zohlalutyo. Cela abafundi balandele iphethini: izimvo (1969), abasebenzi (1973), ulutsha (1976), ucinezelo (1977), umbutho wabantu abaninzi (1983), ungqubuzano nolawulo longxunguphalo (1985-86). Bonisa ukuba isigaba ngasinye sakha kwesangaphambili - intshukumo yakhula yabanzi yaza yaququzelelwa ngcono nangaphantsi kocinezelo olunzima.

slides.title: Iimeko zongxunguphalo, i-1985-1986
slides.lead: Njengoko iilokishi zivuka, urhulumente walawula ngommiselo wongxunguphalo.

blocks.text: NgoJanuwari 1985 i-ANC eyayisekubhacweni yabiza abantu ukuba benze ucalucalulo **'lungalawuleki'**. Iilokishi zaqhambuka ngoqhankqalazo lwerenti nolwabathengi, uqhankqalazo lwezikolo, ukungayi emsebenzini nokusekwa kweekomiti zezitrato. Urhulumente waphendula nge-**meko yongxunguphalo eyinxenye nge-21 kaJulayi 1985**, kunye **nemeko yongxunguphalo yelizwe lonke nge-12 kaJuni 1986**.

items: Amawaka avalelwa ngaphandle kwetyala, kuquka namatshantliziyo amaninzi e-UDF.
Umkhosi wahlala kwiilokishi kwaye abezindaba bacinywa kakhulu.
Ucinezelo lwacothisa uvukelo kodwa lwaluzange lubuyisele ubungqina bocalucalulo.

media.alt: Isithunzi sesithuthi esixhotyisiweyo phambi kwezindlu zaselokishini emva komqobo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='70' width='34' height='30'/><rect x='190' y='74' width='34' height='26'/></g><path d='M150 70 l17 -14 l17 14 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M190 74 l17 -12 l17 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M28 96 l14 -18 h60 l14 18 v22 h-88 Z' fill='#5c6b40'/><circle cx='48' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><circle cx='96' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='30' height='10' fill='#3f4a2c'/><rect x='20' y='130' width='204' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Isibizo 'sokungalawuleki' savela kwintetho kaOliver Tambo ngoJanuwari 1985. Chaza amaqhinga ovukelo lwabantu abaninzi - uqhankqalazo, ukungayi emsebenzini, izakhelo ezizimeleyo zaselokishini - njengeenzame zokwenza ulawulo lwocalucalulo luwe kwezantsi. Emva koko chaza iimeko zongxunguphalo njengeenzame zikarhulumente zokutyumza oku ngokuvalela abantu, umkhosi noqhwabo-mlomo. Isifundo sohlalutyo: amandla ayenokucinezela uqhankqalazo okwexeshana kodwa enza yanzulu ingxaki yobungqina eyatyhalela urhulumente ekuxoxeni ngo-1990.

slides.title: Uqhankqalazo, ukungayi emsebenzini noxinzelelo lwamazwe ngamazwe
slides.lead: Uxhathiso ludibanisa uxinzelelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle elizweni.

blocks.heading: Uqhankqalazo lwabathengi nolwerenti
blocks.text: Uluntu lwala ukuthenga kwiivenkile ezinabanini abamhlophe okanye ukuhlawula irenti, luchapha uqoqosho nezakhelo zocalucalulo zasekhaya.

blocks.heading: Ukungayi emsebenzini nokuqhankqalaza kwezikolo
blocks.text: Abasebenzi nabafundi bakhupha umsebenzi wabo nokuya kwabo, bebonisa ukukhatywa kocalucalulo ngabantu abaninzi.

blocks.heading: Uxinzelelo lwamazwe ngamazwe
blocks.text: Izohlwayo, ukususwa kotyalo-mali kunye noqhankqalazo lwezemidlalo nenkcubeko kwaqhawula uMzantsi Afrika kwilizwe.

slides.notes: Bonisa indlela uxinzelelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle olomeleza ngayo omnye komnye. Uqhankqalazo lwabathengi nolwerenti lwaguqula ukhetho lwezoqoqosho lwemihla ngemihla lwaba zizixhobo zezopolitiko kwaye lwalunxulumene ngokusondeleyo ne-UDF neemanyano. Izohlwayo zamazwe ngamazwe noqhankqalazo lwezemidlalo (umzekelo ukukhutshwa kwiiOlimpiki nokususwa kweqakamba nombhoxo) kwaphakamisa iindleko zocalucalulo kwaphakamisa nomoya ngaphakathi elizweni. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba bakala ukuba yeyiphi na into eyaba negalelo elikhulu - impikiswano yohlalutyo ye-FET eqhelekileyo.

slides.title: Umbono owaphila ngaphaya kokuvalwa
slides.lead: I-Black Consciousness yaxoxa ukuba inkululeko iqala engqondweni.

blocks.text: Isixhobo esinamandla ngaphezulu esandleni somcinezeli yingqondo yalowo ucinezelweyo.

Ingqiqo kaBiko ichaza ukuba kutheni uxhathiso lweminyaka yee-1970s neyee-1980s lwalunamandla kangaka. Emva kokuba abantu bekhabile inkolelo yokuba ucalucalulo lwalulundalo okanye luhlala kanjalo, akukho mmiselo wokuvala owawunokubuyisela loo nkolelo ngokupheleleyo. Ukuzithemba okwakhiwe yi-Black Consciousness kwondla uvukelo lolutsha lwango-1976, iimanyano, kunye nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abaninzi kwe-UDF.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lo mxholo ukudibanisa imisonto. Ingxoxo eyintloko yale yunithi: ucinezelo lwalunokuvala imibutho, luvalele luze lubulale iinkokeli, kodwa lwalungenakuyiguqula ingqiqo yezopolitiko yezigidi zabantu baseMzantsi Afrika. Cela abafundi banxulumanise lo mxholo nezehlo ezibini ubuncinane ezigqunyiweyo esifundweni (umzekelo iSoweto 1976 ne-UDF). Oku kubonisa uhlobo lomhlathi osekelwe kubungqina owuvuzwa yimibhalo ye-CAPS.

slides.title: Esikufundileyo - nemibuzo ekufuneka iphendulwe
slides.lead: Uxhathiso lwangaphakathi lwakha kwakhona ukusuka kwizimvo ukuya kwintshukumo yabantu abaninzi, kwaye ubungqina bocalucalulo bawa nokuba ucinezelo lwakhula.

blocks.text: Phakathi kokuphela kweminyaka yee-1960s naphakathi kweminyaka yee-1980s, uxhathiso lwasuka kwi-**Black Consciousness** lwaya kuvukelo **lwango-1976**, ukunyuka **kweemanyano zabasebenzi**, kunye **nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abaninzi kwe-UDF**. 'Uhlaziyo' lwe-Tricameral lukarhulumente kunye neemeko zongxunguphalo lwazo zoyisakala ukuzuza ubungqina, kubeka isiseko soxoxo ekupheleni kweshumi leminyaka.

blocks.question: Chaza indlela i-Black Consciousness egalele ngayo ekuvuseleleni uxhathiso ngeminyaka yee-1970s. Sebenzisa ubungqina ukuxhasa impendulo yakho.
Kutheni i-United Democratic Front yaba luhlobo oluphumelelayo loxhathiso lwangaphakathi ngeminyaka yee-1980s?
'Iimeko zongxunguphalo zee-1985-1986 zomeleza ucalucalulo endaweni yokulwenza lubuthathaka.' Uyavuma? Xoxa.

slides.notes: Vala ngokunxulumanisa izigaba njengonobangela nesiphumo. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengemisebenzi esekelwe kwimithombo okanye yokubhala okwandisiweyo; ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kubonisa iindlela zemihlathi neembalasane ze-CAPS. Umbuzo wokugqibela onjengembalasane wenzelwe ukuphikiswa ngabom - vuza umgca ocacileyo wengxoxo oxhaswa bubungqina obuvela esifundweni. Bonisa iyunithi elandelayo: uxoxo, ukuvulwa kwe-ANC ngo-1990, kunye nendlela eya ku-1994.
